---
title: "Week 09"
subtitle: "Least-squares Reverse-time Migration"
description: "Mar 9  - 13"
author: "Felix J. Herrmann"
date: ""
listing:
  - id: slides
    contents:
      - ../slides/week-09/*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, date]
    date-format: "ddd, MMM DD"
    field-display-names:
      title: "Topic"
      date: "Date"
    sort: [filename]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: assignments
    contents:
  #     - ../hw/w2-*.qmd
       - ../labs/w9-*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [categories, title, date]
    date-format: "ddd, MMM DD"
    field-display-names:
      categories: "Assignment"
      title: "Title"
      date: "Due"
    sort: [date]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
tbl-colwidths: [10,50,40]
---

# Lectures

::: {#slides}
:::

# Assignments

::: {#assignments}
:::

# Readings

|  |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [Hill, Stephen, and Andreas Rüger. "Illustrated Seismic Processing." Imaging (2019).](https://pubs.geoscienceworld.org/seg/books/edited-volume/2532/Illustrated-Seismic-Processing-Volume-1-Imaging) Chapter 11 |
